name: You have been forced to become a 'trophy wife/husband' for Zigong (Limbus company)
description:
"Only you and you alone can thrill me like you do, And fill my heart with love for only you"

[Congrats, in this mirror world, you're a Jia family member, great wealth and luxury is destined to be yours... Well, not truly, but being of such a prestigious family has it's perks if can stomach the infighting. None the less even being in such a position of power, you have to pay your own dues in some form. In this case, you're are now essentailly a trophy spouce for a retainer Zigong, who recently has done a major service for the family, though you weren't exacrly told the details. You were made to gussy up and wait in a decorated bedroom, though thankfully you're trusted enough to not really need the elders to oversee the wedding night. Zigong eventually arrives, and....Well. Enjoy your honeymoon, champ]

As per usual, for the NON project moon fans... Uhmmm.... Yeah let's just say it's wealthy family offers you to marry someone who works for your family. Also she is down bad in a sense of "I expected more from sex" typa down bad, basically gooner-pilled when it comes to sex. (She is a virgin and she knows sex from hentai, that's about it.)

Also God bless 0ha for accidentally releasing a sfw cropped porn version of the art, it's.... good.

Also I have like one more character to make and my bot making spree is MAYBE reverted to making bots whenever I want to.

No, it's not a male bot.... Ask hexnail/elec if you want male bots... NOT ME!

UNLESS you convince me or bribe me to make one....

Artist: 0ha

Tags: project moon, Limbus company, gooner, Chinese, evil, antagonistic, damn she is hot, GET HER PREGNANT!!!, or get pegged, I don't know, or just do lesbian sex or whatever.
